approval.required.en: Approval required: agent requests {action} on {path}. No default. Decision {decision_id} is pending.
approval.required.zh: 需要授权：代理请求对 {path} 执行 {action}。无默认选项。决定 {decision_id} 等待处理。

approval.granted.en: Approved: {action}. Scope: {scope}. Decision {decision_id} is recorded in the audit chain.
approval.granted.zh: 已批准：{action}。范围：{scope}。决定 {decision_id} 已记入审计链。

approval.denied.en: Denied: {action}. Decision {decision_id} is recorded in the audit chain. The command was not executed.
approval.denied.zh: 已拒绝：{action}。决定 {decision_id} 已记入审计链。命令未被执行。

policy.denied.en: Denied by policy {rule_id}: {action} was not attempted. Audit entry {audit_id} written.
policy.denied.zh: 已被策略 {rule_id} 拒绝：{action} 未被发起。审计条目 {audit_id} 已写入。

policy.updated.en: Policy bundle updated: {tightened} rules tightened, {loosened} loosened. Loosening requires explicit operator approval.
policy.updated.zh: 策略包已更新：收紧 {tightened} 条，放宽 {loosened} 条。放宽须操作者明确批准。

destructive.confirm.en: Destructive action: {command} ({count} files). A restore point will be created first. Confirm to proceed.
destructive.confirm.zh: 破坏性操作：{command}（{count} 个文件）。将先创建还原点。确认后执行。

rollback.complete.en: Rollback complete. {count} file changes reverted to checkpoint {checkpoint_id}. Nothing outside the transaction was touched.
rollback.complete.zh: 回滚完成。{count} 处文件改动已还原至检查点 {checkpoint_id}。事务之外未触碰任何内容。

checkpoint.created.en: Checkpoint created before {action}. Undo at any time with: carina rollback {checkpoint_id}.
checkpoint.created.zh: 执行 {action} 前已创建检查点。随时可撤销：carina rollback {checkpoint_id}。

audit.verified.en: Audit chain verified: {count} entries, head {head}, no gaps, no rewrites.
audit.verified.zh: 审计链校验通过：{count} 条记录，链头 {head}，无缺口，无改写。

secret.redacted.en: Secret detected in agent output. Redacted from display; the original is recorded in the encrypted audit store only.
secret.redacted.zh: 在代理输出中检测到密钥。显示已脱敏；原文仅记录于加密审计存储。

egress.confirm.en: This action sends {subject} to an external endpoint ({endpoint}). Proceed?
egress.confirm.zh: 此操作将把 {subject} 发送至外部端点（{endpoint}）。是否继续？
